title: Differing interpretation of historical schemas
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t5(a INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, b VARCHAR NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t6(a INTEGER NOT NULL, b VARCHAR, PRIMARY KEY(a));
INSERT INTO t6(a, b) VALUES (2, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t5 UNION SELECT * FROM t6;
key_bug_features: Differing interpretation of PRIMARY KEY in table creation
